mapper.sql: id, user_id, client_id, session_no, session_time, duration, session_type, session_mode, fee, has_supervision, supervision_type, supervision_fee, content_summary, client_status, homework, next_plan, subjective, objective, assessment, plan, session_notes, attachments, is_billed, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_session ( user_id, client_id, session_no, session_time, duration, session_type, session_mode, fee, has_supervision, supervision_type, supervision_fee, content_summary, client_status, homework, next_plan, subjective, objective, assessment, plan, session_notes, attachments, is_billed, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sessionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{duration, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sessionType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sessionMode, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{hasSupervision, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supervisionType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supervisionFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{contentSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homework, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjective, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{objective, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionNotes, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isBilled, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_session WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_session ORDER BY session_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_session WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY session_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_session WHERE client_id = #{clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY session_time DESC

SELECT s.,
FROM t_session s WHERE s.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT s.,
FROM t_session s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY s.session_time DESC

SELECT s.,
FROM t_session s WHERE s.client_id = #{clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY s.session_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_session WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_session ( user_id, client_id, session_no, session_time, duration, session_type, session_mode, fee, has_supervision, supervision_type, supervision_fee, content_summary, client_status, homework, next_plan, subjective, objective, assessment, plan, session_notes, attachments, is_billed, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sessionNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sessionTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.duration, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.sessionType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.sessionMode, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.fee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.hasSupervision, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.supervisionType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.supervisionFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.contentSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.clientStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.homework, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.nextPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.subjective, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.objective, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assessment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.plan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sessionNotes, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isBilled, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_session WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_session SET is_billed = #{isBilled, jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT( #{prefix, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_FORMAT(#{date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m%d'), LPAD( IFNULL( (SELECT SUBSTRING(MAX(session_no), LENGTH(#{prefix})+9) FROM t_session WHERE session_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, DATE_FORMAT(#{date, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m%d'), '%')), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) AS session_no
